title: Portfolio E-Commerce Analytics
description: End-to-end analytics pipeline built on the TheLook e-commerce dataset. Combines dbt for transformation, BigQuery for warehousing, and the Claude API for automated insight generation — producing plain-English analysis of sales trends, customer behavior, and product performance without manual intervention.

title: MedImpact Platform Consolidation
description: Post-acquisition integration of two legacy healthcare analytics environments onto a unified next-generation platform. Assessed ETL systems across both organizations, eliminated redundant tooling, and delivered a consolidated architecture that drove >$1M in annual licensing savings while improving data quality and delivery reliability.

title: Cue Health Manufacturing Intelligence
description: Real-time analytics pipeline integrating data from 12+ manufacturing cells into a GCP data lake. Enabled OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness) monitoring and production quality analytics — including the early-warning signal that identified and helped resolve a $10M field failure issue before it reached full scale.
